---
title: "Downloads"
subtitle: "Exercise files, solution files, and Shiny app templates"
---

## How to Use These Files

1. **Right-click** on the download link and select **"Save link as..."**
2. Save the `.qmd` file to your workshop project folder
3. Open the file in **RStudio**
4. Run code chunks using the green **play button** (▶)

Exercise files contain tasks with blank spaces (`___`) for you to fill in. Solution files contain completed code with interpretations.

## Day 1 — Decision Trees

### Session 3: GDM Diagnostic Decision Tree

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [gdm-exercise.qmd](day1/session3-gdm-diagnostic-tree/gdm-exercise.qmd) | Exercise: Modify prevalence, OGTT cost, DIPSI sensitivity, run sensitivity analysis |
| [gdm-solution.qmd](day1/session3-gdm-diagnostic-tree/gdm-solution.qmd) | Solution: Completed tasks with interpretations |

### Session 4: DES vs BMS Therapeutic Decision Tree

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [des-bms-exercise.qmd](day1/session4-des-bms-therapeutic-tree/des-bms-exercise.qmd) | Exercise: Pre-regulation prices, restenosis rates, threshold analysis, NNT |
| [des-bms-solution.qmd](day1/session4-des-bms-therapeutic-tree/des-bms-solution.qmd) | Solution: Completed tasks with interpretations |

## Day 2 — Markov Model and PSA

### Session 5: CKD 4-State Markov Model

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [ckd-exercise.qmd](day2/session5-ckd-markov/ckd-exercise.qmd) | Exercise: Time horizon, treatment effect, dialysis cost, two-way sensitivity |
| [ckd-solution.qmd](day2/session5-ckd-markov/ckd-solution.qmd) | Solution: Completed tasks with interpretations |

### Session 6: Probabilistic Sensitivity Analysis

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [psa-exercise.qmd](day2/session6-psa/psa-exercise.qmd) | Exercise: Iteration count, uncertainty propagation, EVPI |
| [psa-solution.qmd](day2/session6-psa/psa-solution.qmd) | Solution: Completed tasks with interpretations |

## Day 3 — Partitioned Survival and Shiny Apps

### Session 8: Breast Cancer Partitioned Survival Model

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [breast-cancer-exercise.qmd](day3/session8-breast-cancer-psm/breast-cancer-exercise.qmd) | Exercise: Time horizon, biosimilar pricing, 9-week regimen, distribution comparison |
| [breast-cancer-solution.qmd](day3/session8-breast-cancer-psm/breast-cancer-solution.qmd) | Solution: Completed tasks with interpretations |

### Session 9: PSA for the Breast Cancer Model

| File | Description |
|---|---|
| [psa-psm-exercise.qmd](day3/session9-psa-psm/psa-psm-exercise.qmd) | Exercise: Cost uncertainty, probability of cost-effectiveness at multiple WTP thresholds |
| [psa-psm-solution.qmd](day3/session9-psa-psm/psa-psm-solution.qmd) | Solution: Completed tasks with interpretations |

## Shiny App Templates

These are standalone R Shiny applications. To run them:

1. Download the `app.R` file into a folder
2. Open it in RStudio
3. Click **"Run App"** (or run `shiny::runApp()` in the console)

| App | Description |
|---|---|
| [Diagnostic Tree app.R](shiny-apps/diagnostic-tree/app.R) | Interactive GDM screening model with parameter sliders |
| [Therapeutic Tree app.R](shiny-apps/therapeutic-tree/app.R) | Interactive DES vs BMS model with cost breakdown charts |
| [Markov Model app.R](shiny-apps/markov-model/app.R) | Interactive CKD Markov model with trace plots |
| [Partitioned Survival app.R](shiny-apps/partitioned-survival/app.R) | Interactive breast cancer PSM with survival curve fitting |
